# Available variables: # - case_id: the case that just reached this phase # - request: allows you to make HTTP requests (method, url, headers, data) # - json_dumps: allows you to use JSON.dumps to convert an object into a json # - json_load: allows you to use JSON.load to convert a json into an object # - env: Odoo Environment on which the action is triggered # - time, datetime, dateutil, timezone: useful Python libraries # - float_compare: Odoo function to compare floats based on specific precisions # - ValidationError: Warning Exception to use with raise # - Command: x2Many commands namespace # - OrderedDict: ordered dictionaries # - log: log(message, level='info'): logging function to record debug information in ir.logging table # (line = case id, func = phase name) # - format_exc: forwarded from traceback.format_exc - returns str stack trace of last exception thrown # - first: forwarded from odoo.fields.first - safely gets first element of recordset # To return a result, assign: result = {...} # WARNING: if return = False or return value is not in the result table or no result is returned at all, # phase result will not be set. try: is_automatic = case_id.is_automatic_case if is_automatic: result = "AUTOMATICO" else: result = "MANUALE" except Exception as e : case_id.write({ 'info_message':(case_id.info_message + "\n" + str(e)) if case_id.info_message else str(e) })

# Available variables: # - case_id: the case that just reached this phase # - request: allows you to make HTTP requests (method, url, headers, data) # - json_dumps: allows you to use JSON.dumps to convert an object into a json # - json_load: allows you to use JSON.load to convert a json into an object # - env: Odoo Environment on which the action is triggered # - time, datetime, dateutil, timezone: useful Python libraries # - float_compare: Odoo function to compare floats based on specific precisions # - ValidationError: Warning Exception to use with raise # - Command: x2Many commands namespace # - OrderedDict: ordered dictionaries # - log: log(message, level='info'): logging function to record debug information in ir.logging table # (line = case id, func = phase name) # - format_exc: forwarded from traceback.format_exc - returns str stack trace of last exception thrown # - first: forwarded from odoo.fields.first - safely gets first element of recordset # To return a result, assign: result = {...} # WARNING: if return = False or return value is not in the result table or no result is returned at all, # phase result will not be set.
sp = case_id.service_point_ids[0]
if sp.pod_id: result = "ELE" elif sp.pdr_id: result= "GAS"
